Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "BUMPINGBUGGIES-8000-3FE0" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $8000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Bumping Buggies.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $8000 which sets $034C to $3D (the equals sign). Without this the game will not start (probably a simple protection check to ensure this byte in the tape buffer is set as expected by a real load from tape).
